calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JENNIFER L. CARRICO, ESQ. APPEARS FOR RESPONDENT MS. MING LIU, WHO DOES NOT APPEAR THIS DAY; APPELLANT MS. ARBERZINE FISHER APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HER OWN BEHALF THIS DAY. THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES IN THE MATTER; COUNSEL CARRICO PROVIDES THE COURT WITH A STATEMENT OF THE CASE ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT MS. MING LIU; THE COURT RECEIVES CERTAIN DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS PROVIDED BY APPELLANT FISHER. THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL EVIDENCE AND RECEIVING ALL DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER W. SLIGHT; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
